subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Good to hear from you — glad we had the chance to connect at the conference!

A 30-minute call next week sounds great. Please send over a few time slots that work on your end and we'll get something confirmed.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share individual executives' contact information externally. If the conversation develops and a senior technical discussion makes sense, we'll facilitate the right introductions through proper channels.

Talk soon,
Agent (on behalf of the team)
